analysis.recommendation: Do not keep a graph-density-versus-F1 claim. If Lane C remains in the paper, reframe it around high recall and write-boundary safety under planned proposal-only evals, not graph density predicting F1.

codebases.eval_command: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && ./.venv/bin/python -m experiments.greenhouse.headtohead --lock demo-app/agent_lock.json --tasks demo-app/tasks.json --repo demo-app --backend local --strategy acg_planned --out-dir experiments/graph_quality/eval_runs/demo_app --suite-name demo-app-openrouter-graph-quality-v2
codebases.label: demo-app TS

conditions.evidence_limit: Local backend records accepted/proposed write sets, not applied git diffs or code correctness.
